---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for BROski-Bot
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you want.

## 🎯 Problem It Solves
What problem does this solve? (e.g., "I always forget to claim daily rewards")

## 💡 Proposed Solution
How would you like it to work?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Any other ways to solve this?

## 🎮 Example Usage
```
/example-command option
```

## 🧠 Neurodivergent-Friendly Impact
Would this help with ADHD/dyslexia/focus? How?

## 📊 Priority
- [ ] Must-have (blocks my workflow)
- [ ] Nice-to-have (would improve experience)
- [ ] Low priority (just an idea)

## 🤝 Willing to Contribute?
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] No, but I can test it
- [ ] Just suggesting
